summary: Iteration 3 testing for Alyssa Driver Checkpoint: tipe_kendaraan/no_rangka/legs[] in trip doc, Xendit MOCKED disburse endpoint, Odoo webhook dispatcher + odoo_synced state, frontend banner enhancement + Rute Pengiriman section. Backend: 25/25 pytest passed (18 regression + 7 new). Frontend: All 4 scenarios verified on mobile 414w viewport.
critical_code_review_comments: DriverCheckpoint.jsx now ~660 lines — still recommend splitting TahapCard + legs section + handover section + SOP modal into sub-components for maintainability.

Xendit endpoint is correctly MOCKED with persisted disbursement_id + status='MOCKED_PENDING'; logic is isolated so easy to swap with real Xendit SDK call later. Note: response key is 'mocked: true' which is good explicit signal.

notify_odoo() uses fire-and-forget (asyncio.to_thread + requests with 5s timeout) and silently logs on failure — correct non-blocking design. ODOO_WEBHOOK_URL empty → logger.info skip (verified, no exception).
odoo_synced.handover idempotency works (verified test_24). Same pattern used for cair_N (test_25). Good guard against double-dispatch.

legs are stored as free-form List[Dict[str, Any]] without Pydantic schema — acceptable for the current admin-driven workflow but ideally would have a Leg sub-model (jalur, asal, tujuan, kapal, status) for validation.
Frontend readURLParams JSON.parse on legs is wrapped in try/catch with sensible fallback to [] — robust.
Backend still has no max upload size enforcement (carried over from iter-2 review).
Previously reported leading-dot bug in greet block is FIXED in current code (no '.{trip.nama_driver}' literal anymore).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_driver_checkpoint.py (added test_19..test_25 for iter-3 features; full 25-test regression suite)
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: MongoDB trips created via pytest: TRIP-TEST-*, TRIP-I3-*, TRIP-NOHOOK-*, TRIP-HOV-*, TRIP-CAIR-*, TRIP-GATE-*. Frontend test trips: TRIP-FE-LEGS, TRIP-FE-NOLEGS. All persisted with uploads under /app/backend/uploads/.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_driver_checkpoint.py as regression suite (25 tests). New iter-3 endpoints: POST /api/trips/{id}/xendit/disburse (returns {mocked, disbursement_id, tahap, note, trip}). Trip doc now has fields: tipe_kendaraan, no_rangka, legs[], xendit{t1,t2,t3}, odoo_synced{handover,cair_1..3}. Frontend legs card visible only when (nama_driver set AND legs non-empty). For frontend leg testing, pass legs via ?legs=encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify([...])). ODOO_WEBHOOK_URL is empty by default — notify_odoo() logs only and never raises (verified).
rca of the issue: No issues found. All iter-3 features (tipe/rangka in banner via drv-tipe, legs card with leg-{i} testids, Xendit MOCKED endpoint with proper response shape and persistence, Odoo dispatcher with empty webhook safely skipping, odoo_synced idempotent flags after handover+cair) work as specified.
